chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يُزَادُ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 68 – What should be increased from the Prayer during the Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/378)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/378)
text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَزِيدُ فِي صَلَاتِهِ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ إِذَا صَلَّى الْعَتَمَةَ صَلَّى بَعْدَهَا فَيَقُومُ النَّاسُ خَلْفَهُ فَيَدْخُلُ وَ يَدَعُهُمْ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ أَيْضاً فَيَجِيئُونَ وَ يَقُومُونَ خَلْفَهُ فَيَدَعُهُمْ وَ يَدْخُلُ مِرَاراً
قَالَ وَ قَالَ لَا تُصَلِّ بَعْدَ الْعَتَمَةِ فِي غَيْرِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ubeyd, from Yunus, from Abu Al Abbas Al Baqbaan, and Ubeyd Bin Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> used to increase in his<sup>saww</sup> Prayers during a Month of Ramazan. When he<sup>saww</sup> Prayed at dusk, Prayed after it, so the people would be standing behind him<sup>saww</sup>. So he<sup>saww</sup> would enter (his<sup>saww</sup> chamber) and leave them. Then he<sup>saww</sup> would come out as well, so they would be coming, and they would be standing behind him<sup>saww</sup>. So he<sup>saww</sup> would leave them, and he<sup>saww</sup> would enter his<sup>saww</sup> chambers time and again’.
He (the narrator) said, ‘And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not Pray after the dusk during other than a Month of Ramazan’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from Yunus from abu al-‘Abbas al-Baqbaq and ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, would increase his salat (prayer) during the month of Ramadan. After al-‘Atmah (late evening salat [prayer]), he would perform more prayers. People behind would stand up (for prayer), but he would go inside and leave them. Then, after he came out, they would come and stand up behind him (for prayer), but he would leave them and go inside several times.’ He (the narrator) has said that the Imam then said, ‘You must not perform salat (prayer) after late evening prayer during the times other than the month of Ramadan.’”
